description: The Front of Islamic Revolution Stability (Jebhe-ye Paydari-ye Enqelab-e Eslami), known as Paydari or the Steadfast Front, is the most hardline political faction operating within the Islamic Republic's official political space. Founded in 2011 by disciples of [Mohammad-Taqi Mesbah Yazdi](/people/mohammad-taqi-mesbah-yazdi), it advocates absolute velayat-e faqih and the total rejection of Western diplomacy. Key parliamentary figures include [Mahmoud Nabavian](/people/mahmoud-nabavian), [Hamid Rasaee](/people/hamid-rasaee), and [Amir-Hossein Sabeti](/people/amir-hossein-sabeti). The front outperformed [Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf](/people/mohammad-bagher-ghalibaf)'s SHANA coalition in Tehran in the 2024 parliamentary election.
editorial_notes: Also known as 'Steadfast Front' or 'Endurance Front'. Founded 2011 by Mesbah Yazdi's students. Distinct from but overlapping with the SHANA coalition.
